caption:
🌙✨ Late nights aren't just for studying, darling.

I was locked in the lecture hall, the one that overlooks the quad, when he slipped in. Professor Elena, I was told, but tonight I'm just Elena. 💃🏻 The tight silk blouse hugs every curve, the pencil skirt hugging my hips like a promise. I felt his gaze before I even heard the door creak. He wanted answers, but I was giving more than equations. My breath hitched when he moved closer, the air thick with scent and desire. He traced my collarbone, fingers lingering where the silk met skin. We didn't speak, just looked. The world outside kept spinning, but here, time stopped. A secret shared between the pages of an open book. 📖🔥 The scent of old paper mixed with the sharp tang of his cologne, a perfect storm. I adjusted the strap of my skirt, feeling the fabric cling as I turned. He stepped into my personal space, close enough to feel the heat radiating from his body. My fingers tapped against the desk, a nervous rhythm that turned into something slower. The dim light caught the gold chain on my neck, a subtle accent to the evening. We were teachers and students, but the lines were blurring in the shadows of the library. A whisper, a touch, a promise made under the moon. Tonight, the curriculum was passion. 🎓❤️ #UniversitySecrets #ProfessorLife #ElegantDanger #LateNightStudy #CurvesAndBooks #FrenchElegance #InstaTeacher #SultryAcademics #OfficeRomance #StunningBeauty
